response.justification: Strong senior software engineer with broad full-stack experience, Linux/open-source affinity, and a long-running open-source GIS project that shows architectural ownership. However, the role is an executive-level Head of Development requiring formal team leadership, and the resume shows individual-contributor senior/staff roles without explicit people-management or tech-lead titles. The hard blocker is German at only basic level versus the C1 requirement.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with architecture and open-source project ownership (GISCollective, multiple D libraries)
Strong Linux/Unix and open-source orientation matching the company's digital-sovereignty focus
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching ability via workshops, courses, and refactoring dojos
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — fails the C1 minimum requirement
No explicit team-lead or people-management title; experience is senior IC rather than head-of-development
UML and formal requirements-management experience not evidenced on the resume

key_factors.factor: Strong open-source and Linux-aligned engineering depth
